ogTitle: Watermans Bay vs Wattening: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Watermans Bay and Wattening.
heading: Watermans Bay vs Wattening — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Watermans Bay, Western Australia and Wattening, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wattening has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Watermans Bay (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Watermans Bay or Wattening safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Watermans Bay has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Wattening scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Watermans Bay scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Wattening scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Watermans Bay or Wattening?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wattening has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
